basic_details.job_title: DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Social Welfare Office Thanjavur (DSWO Thanjavur)
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Office Thanjavur (DSWO Thanjavur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Multipurpose Helper Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 20-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Read and Write, 3 years working experience
qualification.details: Multipurpose Helper: Read and write with 3 years of working experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.thanjavur.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.thanjavur.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper recruitment is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Multipurpose Helper.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Multipurpose Helper post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Multipurpose Helper post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Multipurpose Helper post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be able to read and write and have at least 3 years of working experience to be eligible for the Multipurpose Helper post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Multipurpose Helper post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Multipurpose Helper post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Multipurpose Helper position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 10000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DSWO Thanjavur Multipurpose Helper recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and application form on the official website of DSWO Thanjavur, which is www.thanjavur.nic.in. Links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
